summary: First full-stack test of HisaabBot MVP. All 16 backend pytest cases PASS (health, auth register/login/me, GSTIN verify, invoice CRUD, dashboard summary with correct seeded totals 52080/68320, GST summary with output_tax=5580/itc=7320/net_payable=0, UPI list+create, chat with GPT-4o reply, voice extract-text with Hinglish extraction, WhatsApp webhook stub, invoice OCR via GPT-4o vision). All frontend flows verified via Playwright: landing page (hero 'Apna CA WhatsApp pe', pricing tiers Free/Starter/Pro/CA Plan visible), login redirect to dashboard with Sharma Textiles/GSTIN in topbar, dashboard 4 stat cards + month summary + GSTR-1/3B deadlines, chat playground sends message and receives GPT-4o reply, invoices page shows Kailash/Bharat seeded data, GST returns page shows GSTR-1/GSTR-3B/ITC/Net, UPI page shows Bharat Kapda + Cash Customer transactions, voice extract-text returns 25000 amount + confidence, settings shows profile + GSTIN verify UI, signup creates new user and enters dashboard, logout clears session and returns to landing.

issues: Name/Business/Phone/City inputs lack data-testid and placeholder attributes making automated testing harder; only email/password have type-based selectors. Rely on positional order.
Message input and Send button lack data-testid; had to fall back to placeholder-substring matching.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to interactive elements across pages (signup inputs, chat send button, voice extract button, settings verify button, logout button) for reliable regression testing.
Optional: Show a distinct URL/toast on logout success; currently redirects to '/' which works but is silent.

Optional: Backend test suite creates one extra UPI transaction that persists in demo user (₹500), inflating UPI-month count by 1. Consider adding cleanup fixture that deletes TEST_ prefixed data after class.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~940 lines — consider splitting into routers/ (auth, invoices, gst, chat, upi, voice) and models/ modules for maintainability once features grow.

CORS is allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False; frontend correctly uses localStorage Bearer token (hb_token) — this is consistent and works. Cookies are still being set by backend but ignored cross-origin, which is fine but slightly redundant.
get_current_user uses ObjectId(uid) without try/except — a malformed token subject would raise 500 instead of 401. Wrap in try/except InvalidId.
compute_gst_summary: 'total_tax' on invoice document isn't guaranteed to equal cgst+sgst+igst; consider deriving it or validating on create.
Voice extract-text and OCR return _raw/_error keys on LLM JSON parse failure — good graceful fallback.
Seeded UPI transactions and invoices in current month (dynamic YYYY-MM) — good.
Dashboard 'today' shows ₹0 (correct since seeded dates are 3rd–8th of the month, not today). Working as designed.
Prefer explicit HTTPException handling on register when GSTIN provided but invalid (currently returns 400 — good).
test_credentials: Demo vendor: ramesh@hisaabbot.in / demo123. Admin: admin@hisaabbot.in / admin123. Both seeded on startup.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds admin + demo vendor 'Ramesh Sharma' of Sharma Textiles (GSTIN 08AABCU9603R1ZM) with 4 invoices (2 purchase totals 68320, 2 sales totals 52080) and 2 UPI transactions in the current month on server startup. Test suite added 1 extra UPI txn (₹500) which persists — should be cleaned by main agent if precise UPI totals matter.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env. Auth uses Bearer token in Authorization header (localStorage.hb_token on frontend). Chat/OCR/Voice-extract require EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (already set). Note: extra ₹500 UPI txn from previous test run may exist on demo user; if you re-run dashboard tests expecting exactly ₹52,080 UPI, delete via DB or check upi_month['count'] as flexible >=2. Frontend elements often lack data-testid — recommend using placeholder-substring or positional selectors as done in this iteration.
